page_content:
LBSC - Library Science

LBSC208 Special Topics in Information Studies (3 Credits) Special topics in aspects of information use, technology, and policy. Repeatable to: 6 credits if content differs.

LBSC386 Experiential Learning (3-6 Credits) Restriction: Junior standing or higher; and must have learning proposal approved by the Ofﬁce of Experiential Learning Programs, faculty sponsor, and student's internship sponsor.

Courses in 2025-2026 Academic Catalog - DRAFT COPY

LBSC499 Workshops, Clinics, and Institutes (1-9 Credits) Workshops, clinics, and institutes developed around speciﬁc topics or problems. Primarily for practicing librarians. Repeatable to: 9 credits.
